title: Registration
authorRules: 1 paper is covered under each professional registration.
In case an author has more papers than covered under their registration, additional charges will apply per extra paper.
Only one extra paper is allowed per author.
At least one author (presenting author or co-author) should be registered to have the paper to be included in the conference proceedings.

Government Organization delegates (payment mode NEFT only) should use the bank details below. After payment, update registration form along with payment details — tickets are issued after successful payment verification.
Students availing student registration must provide a valid student ID card/Bonafide certificate at the time of registration.
Papers registered under Student category needs to be presented by Students only.
It is mandatory for everyone to register to attend the conference.
Co-authors do not come under accompanying person category.
Accompanying persons are not entitled to attend technical sessions. Their access will be limited to exhibition area/food area/social events (if any).
termsAndConditions: The registration fee mentioned above is EXCLUSIVE of GST @ 18%, as applicable.

You can register online using your Debit/Credit Card or transferring the amount online (wire transfer/NEFT). Registration is mandatory & will be only considered as confirmed on receipt of the full amount.
While your safety is of utmost importance, the organisers will take no responsibility for loss of belongings/valuables or damage to your property.
The registration fee does not include any travel cost, insurance, accommodation, sightseeing tours or airport transfers.
